default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's content marketing services to Austin Sandmeyer from Sendoso and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sendoso hasn't actively managed or developed content strategy for \~2.5 years, creating an opportunity to revitalize their content efforts](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content strategy and production service, leveraging AI and expert editors to create high-quality, efficient content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [The GrowthX process begins with a low-risk 8-week strategy sprint, followed by ongoing execution if both parties agree to continue](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

## Topics

### Sendoso's Content Needs

  - [Haven't actively managed content in \~2.5 years](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Goal: Become a "content powerhouse" for target industries and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Focus on being a thought leader in direct mail and gifting for B2B SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to expand direct mail solutions beyond gifting](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Comprehensive content strategy and production service](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows combined with expert human editors](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Services include content creation, refreshes, and visual elements](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Ability to repurpose existing content (e.g., webinars, podcasts) for SEO and nurture streams](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### GrowthX's Process

1.  Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):
      - [Deep dive into company, products, and customers](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
      - [Create content strategy, artifacts, and content OS](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [Begin content production if possible](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
2.  Growth Execution Phase:
      - [Ongoing content production and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
      - [Weekly meetings and progress reports](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

### GrowthX's Differentiators

  - [Eliminates need for large in-house content team](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Provides high-quality content at \~10-20 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Combines AI efficiency with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Flexible approach tailored to each client's needs and timeline](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1619.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up after the call to schedule the strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Tentatively penciled in for the last week of June](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Austin and Casey to align on the proposed timeline](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [If June doesn't work, the next available slot would be after July 4th](https://fathom.video/share/sGRAsNRjaN7dBxxPMxh1WpaHcjCvsnHm?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)

Follow up w/ Austin & Casey post-call to confirm strategy sprint scheduling
